text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, I'll rule the entire world in due time. And
once that's done... I'm going to take you into the
cosmos!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Pearl, you say the darndest things.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Japan, France, America... Once I've conquered it
all, there's no point in racing on this planet
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have to ride a "shuttle" into space!
And I'll seize all the pearls that glow in the night
sky!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, Pearl. You got it all backwards.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: When you become a world champion, don't ya know you should come right back here?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's like my mama told me. Our goals aren't at the
end of any rainbow. They're right here next to us
all along!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The great beyond you're aimin' for is right near
this very academy. That's where ya need to run...
